name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie flat on the bench with eyes under the bar.
Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder width.
Lower the bar to the mid chest under control.
Press explosively until elbows are extended.
tips: Drive feet into the floor throughout.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set the bench to a low incline.
Kick the dumbbells to shoulder level.
Lower until elbows reach a deep stretch.
Press the weights up and slightly inward.
tips: Do not flare elbows too early.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lie on a flat bench with dumbbells above the chest.
Open the arms in a wide arc with a soft elbow bend.
Stretch the chest at the bottom.
Bring the dumbbells back together over the sternum.
tips: Avoid turning it into a press.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Place hands just outside shoulder width.
Brace glutes and abs to form a straight line.
Lower until the chest is just above the floor.
Press back to the top without sagging the hips.

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Adjust the seat so handles line up with mid chest.
Press the handles forward until arms are extended.
Return slowly until you feel a chest stretch.
Repeat for controlled reps.
tips: Use a full but pain-free range.

name: Cable Crossover
instructions: Set pulleys slightly above shoulder height.
Step forward into a split stance.
Sweep the handles together in front of the torso.
Return with control to stretch the pecs.
tips: Lead with the elbows, not the hands.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from the bar with a shoulder-width grip.
Brace the core and depress the shoulders.
Pull the chest toward the bar.
Lower under control to full extension.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit tall and grip the bar outside shoulder width.
Pull the bar to the upper chest.
Squeeze the lats at the bottom.
Return slowly without losing posture.
tips: Do not yank with the lower back.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge until torso is near parallel.
Row the bar to the lower ribs.
Pause briefly at the top.
Lower until elbows are straight.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit tall with knees slightly bent.
Row the handle to the mid torso.
Pinch the shoulder blades together.
Extend arms back out slowly.

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: Support one hand and knee on a bench.
Let the dumbbell hang below the shoulder.
Row toward the hip.
Lower until the lat is fully stretched.

name: Straight Arm Pulldown
instructions: Grab the bar with straight arms.
Hinge slightly and brace the core.
Drive the bar down toward the thighs.
Return until the lats are stretched overhead.
tips: Do not turn it into a row.

name: Seated Dumbbell Press
instructions: Sit tall with dumbbells at shoulder height.
Press them overhead until biceps reach ears.
Pause without shrugging.
Lower under control to the start.

name: Barbell Overhead Press
instructions: Set the bar on the front rack.
Brace glutes and abs.
Press the bar in a straight path overhead.
Return to the shoulders under control.
tips: Move head slightly back, then through.
Do not overextend the low back.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand tall with dumbbells at the sides.
Raise arms out to shoulder height.
Pause briefly with control.
Lower slowly to the thighs.

name: Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Hinge at the hips with neutral spine.
Open the arms wide to the sides.
Squeeze rear delts at the top.
Return with control.
tips: Do not yank the weights up.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start with palms facing you at chin level.
Rotate palms outward as you press overhead.
Finish with arms fully extended.
Reverse the path on the way down.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Hold the bar with a narrow overhand grip.
Pull elbows upward to chest level.
Pause briefly at the top.
Lower back to the thighs.

name: Standing Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder width apart.
Grip the bar just outside hips.
Curl the bar toward the shoulders.
Lower slowly to full extension.
tips: Keep elbows pinned to your sides.

name: Alternating Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Stand tall with dumbbells at your sides.
Curl one weight while supinating the wrist.
Lower that arm before repeating on the other side.
Alternate for all reps.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Rest upper arms on the preacher pad.
Curl the bar upward without lifting elbows.
Squeeze at the top.
Lower until arms are almost straight.
tips: Keep shoulders out of the lift.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Sit against an incline bench.
Let the arms hang straight down.
Curl the dumbbells without moving the shoulders.
Lower until the biceps are fully stretched.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells with neutral grip.
Curl while keeping palms facing inward.
Pause at the top.
Lower with control.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Attach a straight or EZ bar low on the cable.
Stand upright and grip the handle.
Curl toward the shoulders.
Return until elbows are fully extended.

name: Close Grip Bench Press
instructions: Lie on the bench with a narrower than shoulder-width grip.
Lower the bar to the lower chest.
Keep elbows tucked.
Press back to lockout.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand tall at a cable station.
Pin elbows to your sides.
Press the bar or rope down until arms are straight.
Return slowly to 90 degrees.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold one dumbbell overhead with both hands.
Lower it behind the head by bending elbows.
Stretch the triceps.
Extend elbows to raise it back up.

name: Skullcrusher
instructions: Lie flat and hold the bar above the shoulders.
Bend the elbows to lower toward the forehead.
Pause before the bottom.
Extend back to the start.

name: Bench Dip
instructions: Place hands on the edge of a bench behind you.
Extend legs forward and lower the hips.
Descend until elbows are bent.
Press back to straight arms.
tips: Do not drop too low if shoulders complain.

name: Rope Tricep Extension
instructions: Grab the rope attachment with neutral grip.
Press down while separating the rope ends.
Lock out fully.
Return to the start slowly.
tips: Spread the rope at the bottom.
Keep elbows glued to your sides.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Sit and rest forearms on thighs or a bench.
Let the bar roll to the fingers.
Curl the wrists upward.
Lower slowly to a stretch.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
instructions: Place forearms on a bench with palms down.
Lift the bar by extending the wrists.
Pause briefly at the top.
Lower under control.

name: Reverse Curl
instructions: Grip the bar palms down.
Curl it to shoulder height.
Pause at the top.
Lower until elbows are straight.

name: Farmer Walk
instructions: Pick up heavy dumbbells at your sides.
Stand tall with shoulders packed.
Walk under control for distance or time.
Set the weights down safely.

name: Plate Pinch
instructions: Pinch smooth-side-out plates together.
Lift them off the floor or hold at your sides.
Maintain grip for time.
Lower before grip fails.

name: Towel Pull-Up
instructions: Drape towels over a pull-up bar.
Grip the towels firmly.
Pull your chest upward.
Lower back to a dead hang.
tips: Use thick towels for more challenge.
Keep shoulders engaged at the bottom.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel under the rope attachment.
Hold the rope by the temples.
Crunch the ribs toward the pelvis.
Return slowly to a stretched position.
tips: Move through the spine, not the hips.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from a bar with straight legs.
Brace the core and lift legs upward.
Raise until hips curl slightly.
Lower slowly without swinging.
tips: Posteriorly tilt the pelvis at the top.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel with hands on the ab wheel.
Roll forward while keeping core braced.
Extend until you feel the abs working hard.
Pull back to the start without arching.
tips: Only go as far as you can control.

name: Reverse Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent.
Curl the knees toward the chest.
Lift hips slightly off the floor.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Plank
instructions: Set forearms on the floor under shoulders.
Extend legs behind you.
Brace abs and glutes to stay straight.
Hold while breathing normally.

name: Decline Sit-Up
instructions: Anchor feet on a decline bench.
Lower until torso is extended.
Sit up by contracting the abs.
Descend under control.

name: Back Squat
instructions: Set the bar across the upper back.
Brace and sit between the hips.
Descend until desired depth is reached.
Drive through the floor to stand up.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Rack the bar across the front delts.
Keep elbows high and core braced.
Squat down while staying upright.
Stand back up through the mid-foot.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Place feet shoulder-width on the platform.
Unlock the sled and lower toward the chest.
Stop at comfortable depth.
Press back to full extension without locking hard.
tips: Keep low back on the pad.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Stand tall holding dumbbells.
Step forward into a lunge.
Lower until both knees are bent.
Push through the lead leg and continue forward.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Place rear foot on a bench behind you.
Lower straight down over the front leg.
Reach a deep knee bend.
Drive up through the front foot.
tips: Use a slight forward torso lean.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Adjust the machine so knees line up with the pivot.
Extend the legs until nearly straight.
Squeeze the quads hard.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold the bar at hip level.
Softly bend the knees and hinge backward.
Lower until hamstrings are stretched.
Drive hips through to stand tall.
tips: Do not lose your flat back.

name: Lying Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on the curl machine.
Curl the pad toward the glutes.
Pause at the top.
Lower slowly to full length.
tips: Keep hips pressed into the pad.

name: Good Morning
instructions: Place the bar on the upper back.
Unlock knees and hinge the hips back.
Lower torso until hamstrings are loaded.
Return by driving hips forward.

name: Single Leg RDL
instructions: Stand on one leg with a dumbbell in the opposite hand.
Hinge while extending the free leg behind you.
Lower until the torso is near parallel.
Return to standing with balance.
tips: Reach long through the back leg.

name: Glute Ham Raise
instructions: Set ankles under the machine pads.
Lower the body forward slowly.
Pull back up by flexing the knees.
Finish with hips extended.
tips: Start with partial range if needed.
Do not break at the hips too early.

name: Stability Ball Leg Curl
instructions: Lie on your back with heels on the ball.
Lift the hips into a bridge.
Curl the ball toward you.
Extend back out while keeping hips high.
tips: Move slowly on the way out.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Set upper back against a bench.
Roll the bar over the hips.
Drive hips up until torso is parallel to the floor.
Lower with control.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent.
Press through the heels to lift hips.
Squeeze glutes at the top.
Lower back down slowly.
tips: Do not arch the low back.

name: Cable Kickback
instructions: Attach an ankle strap to a low pulley.
Lean forward holding the station.
Kick the working leg back and up slightly.
Return under control without touching down.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Take a wide stance with toes turned out.
Grip the bar inside the knees.
Brace and push the floor apart.
Stand tall by extending hips and knees.
tips: Keep chest up off the floor.
Pull slack out of the bar first.

name: Step-Up
instructions: Stand facing a bench or box.
Place one foot fully on the platform.
Drive through that leg to stand up.
Lower back down with control.
tips: Minimize pushing off the back foot.
Use a box height you can own.

name: Frog Pump
instructions: Lie on your back and bring the soles of the feet together.
Let knees fall outward.
Drive hips upward by squeezing glutes.
Lower until glutes almost touch the floor.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Place shoulders under the pads.
Rise onto the balls of the feet.
Pause in the contracted position.
Lower into a deep stretch.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Sit with the pad across the thighs.
Push through the balls of the feet.
Squeeze at the top.
Lower until calves are stretched.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
instructions: Set hips under the pad with feet on the block.
Drop heels for a stretch.
Drive up high onto the toes.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Single Leg Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on one foot on a step.
Lower the heel below the step.
Raise up onto the toes.
Repeat for all reps before switching legs.

name: Leg Press Calf Raise
instructions: Place the balls of the feet at the bottom of the platform.
Unlock knees but keep them nearly straight.
Press through the toes to raise the sled slightly.
Lower until calves stretch.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Hold rope handles at hip height.
Jump lightly on the balls of the feet.
Rotate the rope from the wrists.
Maintain rhythm for time.

name: Barbell Shrug
instructions: Hold the bar at arm's length.
Raise shoulders straight up toward ears.
Pause briefly at the top.
Lower under control.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
instructions: Stand tall with dumbbells at the sides.
Elevate the shoulders as high as possible.
Hold the squeeze briefly.
Lower back down slowly.
tips: Use straps if grip is limiting.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Set a rope attachment at upper chest height.
Pull the rope toward the face with elbows high.
Rotate thumbs behind you.
Return slowly to the start.
tips: Spread the rope at the end.

name: High Pull
instructions: Start with the bar at mid thigh.
Explosively extend hips and knees.
Drive elbows high to pull the bar upward.
Lower and reset each rep.
tips: Keep bar close to the body.

name: Rack Pull
instructions: Set the bar just below the knees in a rack.
Grip the bar and brace hard.
Stand tall by driving hips through.
Lower back to the pins under control.
tips: Do not lean backward at the top.

name: Farmer Carry
instructions: Pick up heavy implements at your sides.
Stand tall with shoulders packed.
Walk under control for distance or time.
Set them down safely.
tips: Do not sway side to side.
